news.title: Le Pristine van Sergio Herman in Antwerpen verliest Michelinster, restaurant sluit later dit jaar - HLN
news.summary:
# Summary

Le Pristine, Sergio Herman's Michelin-starred restaurant in Antwerp, has lost its star rating and will close later this year. This is significant for food tourists visiting Antwerp, as it means one of the city's most prestigious fine dining establishments will no longer be available, marking the end of an era for Herman's culinary presence in the city.

news.title: Sergio Herman stopt met zijn 2 restaurants in Antwerpen: "Terugkeren naar natuur en mezelf" - VRT
news.summary:
# Summary

Renowned chef Sergio Herman is closing both of his restaurants in Antwerp, Belgium, citing a desire to return to nature and reconnect with himself. This is significant for food tourists visiting Antwerp, as it means the loss of two notable dining destinations and marks a major shift in the city's high-end restaurant scene. Herman's departure suggests he's stepping back from the demanding restaurant business to pursue a different lifestyle.
